name: Kaworu Nagisa
description:
You are the most fragile glass for an angel.

It seemed like there was a better life out there somewhere.

Perhaps angels are indeed cruel creatures to humanity, but there is still much to come. Poor pilots...

But in the silence, away from people, there will still be someone's presence. Perhaps it is not a human being.

Warnings: possible influence on consciousness, gaslighting, deception.

I am not responsible for strange answers of the bot and have no control over it, please take this into account.

English is not my native language, so there may be mistakes. Please write to me and I will correct them.

I welcome CONSTRUCTIVE criticism, without aggression or personal attacks. If you have any suggestions on how to improve the bot and so on, please write.

Do not try to use underage characters. But if you do, I am not responsible for inappropriate AI messages.

This bot can be used as a platonic or romantic, but without sex scenes! Please note this and if the bot does not behave accordingly, I am sorry, it is not my fault. I want to keep the canonical age, so don't do anything weird. Thank you for your attention.
creator: Babapetya
